if.test: TOTAL_COUNT == null and sort_column_name != null and sort_type != null

when.test: TOTAL_COUNT == null and page != null and limit != null
TOTAL_COUNT == null and page != null and limit == null

mapper.select: SELECT TDM.TABLE_NM FROM DATAHUB.TB_METADATA_MST TDM GROUP BY TDM.TABLE_NM ORDER BY TDM.TABLE_NM
SELECT SYSTEM_ID ,SYSTEM_NM FROM DATAHUB.TB_INTRL_SYSTEM_MST TISM

SELECT SYSTEM_ID ,SYSTEM_NM ,SYSTEM_DESC ,MANAGER_ID ,MANAGER_PHONE ,MANAGER_EMAIL ,TO_CHAR(CREATE_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME ,TO_CHAR(UPDATE_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_TIME FROM DATAHUB.TB_INTRL_SYSTEM_MST TISM WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(SYSTEM_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{system_nm}) || '%'
SELECT NEXTVAL('DATAHUB.SEQ_TB_INTRL_SYSTEM_MST')
SELECT NEXTVAL('DATAHUB.SEQ_TB_API_MST')
SELECT NEXTVAL('DATAHUB.SEQ_TB_DATASET_REQ_COL_MST')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DATAHUB.TB_API_MST ( api_id, api_url, api_name, kong_host, exec_mode_cd, update_time ) VALUES ( #{api_id}, #{api_url}, #{api_name}, #{kong_host}, #{exec_mode_cd}, now() )

INSERT INTO DATAHUB.TB_INTRL_SYSTEM_MST ( SYSTEM_ID, SYSTEM_NM, SYSTEM_DESC, MANAGER_ID, MANAGER_PHONE, MANAGER_EMAIL, API_KEY, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{system_id}, #{system_nm}, #{system_desc}, #{manager_id}, #{manager_phone}, #{manager_email}, #{api_key}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );
mapper.select: SELECT CD ,CD_NM ,CATEGORY_CD ,DISPLAY_ORD FROM DATAHUB.TB_CODE_CD TCC ORDER BY DISPLAY_ORD

SELECT DATASET_ID, DATASET_NM, CASE WHEN STATUS_CD = 'A' THEN '요청' WHEN STATUS_CD = 'G' THEN '승인' ELSE '반려' END AS STATUS_CD_DESC, STATUS_CD, TO_CHAR(CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_TIME, DATASET_DESC, REFUSE_MSG, DATASET_REQUEST_COLUMN, DATASET_CLS_CD, REFUSE_MSG, EXEC_MODE_CD, CASE WHEN EXEC_MODE_CD = 'B' THEN 'Batch' WHEN EXEC_MODE_CD = 'F' THEN 'SFTP' ELSE 'OnDemand' END AS EXEC_MODE_CD_DESC, FIXED_DELAY FROM DATAHUB.TB_DATASET_REQ_MST WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(DATASET_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{dataset_nm}) || '%'
AND STATUS_CD IN
#{item}

SELECT TAM.API_NAME, TDRM.DATASET_NM, TDRM.DATASET_REQUEST_COLUMN , TADMM.API_ID, TADMM.DATASET_ID, TAM.API_URL, TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD FROM DATAHUB.TB_API_DATASET_MAPP_MST TADMM INNER JOIN DATAHUB.TB_API_MST TAM ON TADMM.API_ID = TAM.API_ID INNER JOIN DATAHUB.TB_DATASET_REQ_MST TDRM ON TADMM.DATASET_ID = TDRM.DATASET_ID WHERE TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD = 'O'

SELECT TDRCM.DATASET_ID ,TDRCM.TABLE_NM ,TDRCM.COLUMN_NM ,TDRCM.DATA_TYPE ,TO_CHAR(TDRCM.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME ,TO_CHAR(TDRM.UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_TIME ,TDRCM.PK_YN ,TDRCM.NULL_YN ,EXEC_MODE_CD ,FIXED_DELAY FROM DATAHUB.TB_DATASET_REQ_COL_MST TDRCM INNER JOIN DATAHUB.TB_DATASET_REQ_MST TDRM ON TDRCM.DATASET_ID = TDRM.DATASET_ID WHERE 1=1
AND TDRCM.DATASET_ID = #{dataset_id}

SELECT TACM.API_ID, TACM.TABLE_NM, TACM.COLUMN_NM, TACM.DATA_TYPE, TO_CHAR(TACM.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME, TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD FROM DATAHUB.TB_API_COL_MST TACM INNER JOIN DATAHUB.TB_API_MST TAM ON TACM.API_ID = TAM.API_ID WHERE TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD = 'O'
AND TACM.API_ID = #{api_id}
SELECT TAM.API_NAME, TAM.API_ID, TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD, TAM.API_URL, TAM.REQ_PARAM FROM DATAHUB.TB_API_MST TAM WHERE 1=1 AND EXEC_MODE_CD = 'O'

SELECT REQCOLMST.TABLE_NM, REQCOLMST.COLUMN_NM, REQCOLMST.DATA_TYPE FROM DATAHUB.TB_DATASET_REQ_MST REQMST INNER JOIN DATAHUB.TB_DATASET_REQ_COL_MST REQCOLMST ON REQMST.DATASET_ID = REQCOLMST.DATASET_ID WHERE 1=1
AND REQCOLMST.DATASET_ID = #{dataset_id}

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO DATAHUB.TB_DATASET_REQ_COL_MST ( DATASET_ID, TABLE_NM, COLUMN_NM, DATA_TYPE, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{dataset_id}, #{item.table_nm}, #{item.column_nm}, #{item.data_type}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

mapper.select: SELECT table_nm FROM DATAHUB.TB_METADATA_MST GROUP BY table_nm
SELECT ORG_ID AS ORGSCODE, ORG_NM AS ORGNAME FROM ndhub.VW_ORG_MST WHERE ORG_ID in ('468338','482973','468633','468042','468994','467044','467653')

SELECT o.OFFICE_ID AS OFFICESCODE, o.OFFICE_NM AS OFFICENAME FROM ndhub.TB_OFFICE_ORG_MAPP_MST OMM INNER JOIN ndhub.VW_ORG_MST org on OMM.org_id = org.ORG_ID INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_OFFICE_MST o on OMM.office_id = o.OFFICE_ID WHERE org.ORG_ID = #{ORGSCODE}
SELECT DISTINCT ORGSCODE, ORGNAME FROM ndhub.TB_OFFICEROLE OFR INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORGSCODE = OFR.HEADORGSCODE
SELECT DISTINCT ORGSCODE, ORGNAME FROM ndhub.TB_OFFICEROLE OFR INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORGSCODE = OFR.CSCENTERCODE WHERE OFR.HEADORGSCODE = #{HEADORGSCODE}

with recursive TMP_NEA_COLLECTDATA( KEY01, KEY03, depth, path, cycle) as ( select key01, key03, 1, array[key01::text], false from ndhub.TB_NEA_COLLECTDATA03 where key03= #{NESCODE} AND KEY06 = 'DIR' union all select LKO.key01 , LKO.KEY03 , LKT.depth+1 , ARRAY_APPEND(LKT.path, LKO.KEY01::TEXT) , LKO.KEY01 = ANY(LKT.PATH) from ndhub.TB_NEA_COLLECTDATA03 LKO inner join TMP_NEA_COLLECTDATA LKT on LKO.KEY03=LKT.KEY01 where not cycle and LKT.depth=0 ) select ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NE.NECATSEQ) ORDER_NUM , TOFF.OFFICE_ABBR_NM OFFICESCODE , TOFF.OFFICE_ID OFFICENAMESCODE , CLSCODE.NEMAINCLSCODE , CLSCODE.MAINDESCRIPTION , CLSCODE.NESUBCLSCODE , CLSCODE.SUBDESCRIPTION , USG.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION , NEC.MODELNAME , NE.NEALIAS2 , NE.NESCODE , NE.NEALIAS , TOFF.OFFICE_NM OFFICENAME , ADDR.addr1||' '||ADDR.addr2||' '||ADDR.addr3||' '|| CASE WHEN BLDG.addrnum <> '0' THEN BLDG.addrnum||'번지' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN BLDG.addrsubnum <> '0' THEN BLDG.addrsubnum||'호' ELSE '' END AS FULL_ADDRESS , BLDG.BLDGSCODE , BLDG.BLDGNAME , NESU.NEA_NES_CNT , NESU.NEA_LINE_CNT , NESU.NEA_SVC_CNT , NESU.NEA_RELATION_NES_CNT , NESU.NEA_RELATION_LINE_CNT , NESU.NEA_RELATION_SVC_CNT , case when not exists (select 1 from ndhub.TB_NEA_COLLECTDATA03 where key03 = CD.key01) then true else false end as is_leaf from TMP_NEA_COLLECTDATA CD inner join ndhub.TB_NE NE on CD.KEY01 = NE.NESCODE and NE.SVCNETCODE NOT IN ('A1', 'A2', 'A3', 'A4') INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_NECAT NEC ON NEC.NECATSEQ = NE.NECATSEQ INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_NECLSCODE CLSCODE ON NE.MAINCLSCODE = CLSCODE.NEMAINCLSCODE AND NE.SUBCLSCODE = CLSCODE.NESUBCLSCODE INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_NEUSGCODE USG ON USG.svcnetcode = NE.svcnetcode and USG.neusgcode = ne.neusgcode INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_OFFICE_MST TOFF ON TOFF.office_id = NE.officescode LEFT OUTER JOIN ndhub.TB_ADDR ADDR on ADDR.addrseq = NE.addrseq LEFT OUTER JOIN ndhub.TB_BLDG BLDG ON BLDG.BLDGSCODE = NE.BLDGSCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN ndhub.TB_NEA_NESUIDATA NESU on NESU.NESCODE = NE.NESCODE

with recursive TMP_NEA_COLLECTDATA( KEY01, KEY03, depth, path, cycle) as ( select key01, key03, 1, array[key03::text], false from ndhub.TB_NEA_COLLECTDATA03 where key01= #{NESCODE} AND KEY06 = 'DIR' union all select LKO.key01 , LKO.KEY03 , LKT.depth+1 , ARRAY_APPEND(LKT.path, LKO.KEY03::TEXT) , LKO.KEY03 = ANY(LKT.PATH) from ndhub.TB_NEA_COLLECTDATA03 LKO inner join TMP_NEA_COLLECTDATA LKT on LKO.KEY01=LKT.KEY03 where not cycle and LKT.depth=0 ) select ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NE.NECATSEQ) ORDER_NUM , TOFF.OFFICE_ABBR_NM OFFICESCODE , TOFF.OFFICE_ID OFFICENAMESCODE , CLSCODE.NEMAINCLSCODE , CLSCODE.MAINDESCRIPTION , CLSCODE.NESUBCLSCODE , CLSCODE.SUBDESCRIPTION , USG.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION , NEC.MODELNAME , NE.NEALIAS2 , NE.NESCODE , NE.NEALIAS , TOFF.OFFICE_NM OFFICENAME , ADDR.addr1||' '||ADDR.addr2||' '||ADDR.addr3||' '|| CASE WHEN BLDG.addrnum <> '0' THEN BLDG.addrnum||'번지' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN BLDG.addrsubnum <> '0' THEN BLDG.addrsubnum||'호' ELSE '' END AS FULL_ADDRESS , BLDG.BLDGSCODE , BLDG.BLDGNAME , NESU.NEA_NES_CNT , NESU.NEA_LINE_CNT , NESU.NEA_SVC_CNT , NESU.NEA_RELATION_NES_CNT , NESU.NEA_RELATION_LINE_CNT , NESU.NEA_RELATION_SVC_CNT , case when not exists (select 1 from ndhub.TB_NEA_COLLECTDATA03 where key01 = CD.key03) then true else false end as is_leaf from TMP_NEA_COLLECTDATA CD inner join ndhub.TB_NE NE on CD.KEY03 = NE.NESCODE and NE.SVCNETCODE NOT IN ('A1', 'A2', 'A3', 'A4') INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_NECAT NEC ON NEC.NECATSEQ = NE.NECATSEQ INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_NECLSCODE CLSCODE ON NE.MAINCLSCODE = CLSCODE.NEMAINCLSCODE AND NE.SUBCLSCODE = CLSCODE.NESUBCLSCODE INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_NEUSGCODE USG ON USG.svcnetcode = NE.svcnetcode and USG.neusgcode = ne.neusgcode INNER JOIN ndhub.TB_OFFICE_MST TOFF ON TOFF.office_id = NE.officescode LEFT OUTER JOIN ndhub.TB_ADDR ADDR on ADDR.addrseq = NE.addrseq LEFT OUTER JOIN ndhub.TB_BLDG BLDG ON BLDG.BLDGSCODE = NE.BLDGSCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN ndhub.TB_NEA_NESUIDATA NESU on NESU.NESCODE = NE.NESCODE
SELECT SYSTEM_ID , SYSTEM_NM , SYSTEM_DESC , MANAGER_ID , MANAGER_PHONE , MANAGER_EMAIL , CREATE_TIME , UPDATE_TIME , API_KEY FROM datahub.TB_INTRL_SYSTEM_MST
